EMO and EMO Young Presentation

20
						December

2024

On 19 December 2024, Chamber of
Electrical Engineers and EMO Young Presentation event was held with the
participation of Selçuk Esen, Erkan Solmaz and Nursemin Yıldız for the students
of Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences, Department of Electrical and
Electronics Engineering.
